mnemonics.title: Windows Install: DACI
mnemonics.content: **D**ownload from python.org, **A**dd to PATH (checkbox!), **C**lick Install Now, verify with **I**nterpreter (python --version). DACI gets Python running.

mnemonics.title: Platform Commands
mnemonics.content: **W**indows: python.org installer. **M**ac: brew install python. **L**inux: sudo apt install python3. WML - three platforms, three methods.

mnemonics.title: Post-Install Setup: PVI
mnemonics.content: **P**ip (package manager), **V**irtualenv (isolate dependencies), **I**DE setup (VS Code/Thonny). Three things to do after installing Python.

mnemonics.title: Essential IoT Packages: MPRRF
mnemonics.content: **M**QTT (paho-mqtt), **P**yserial (serial comm), **R**Pi.GPIO (hardware), **R**equests (HTTP API), **F**lask (web server). Five packages every IoT developer installs.

mnemonics.title: Always Use Python 3!
mnemonics.content: Python **3**.x is the standard. Python 2 is **E**nd of **L**ife. Use python3 command on Linux/Mac. Check with python --version or python3 --version.
